name: D&B Finance Analytics
description: Credit origination, portfolio risk, company reports, and folder workflows.
longDescription: Power commercial credit origination and portfolio management workflows with D&B Finance Analytics' embedded AI decisioning layer. Dun & Bradstreet connects the D&B Commercial Graph with proprietary customer data and credit policies to help evaluate applications, set credit limits, organize portfolio folders, and uncover portfolio risk and opportunity.
capabilities: Portfolio search, filtering, aggregation, and sorting
Company search by name or D-U-N-S number
Portfolio folder creation, movement, and organization
